required_documents.name: Levantamiento Topográfico
required_documents.rationale: Required for all projects — establishes site boundaries, levels, and contours. Flat municipal land; 1:500 scale minimum required.

required_documents.name: Estudio de Mecánica de Suelos
required_documents.rationale: Required for all public civic projects — 2,000m² public building requires soil bearing capacity confirmation for structural engineering.

required_documents.name: Escrituras / Título de Propiedad Municipal
required_documents.rationale: Municipal land title or government land use authorization confirming the contracting entity's legal authority to develop the site.
